            var p_o = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(global::TestNs.Order), "o");
            var p_c = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(global::TestNs.Customer), "c");
            var expr_2 = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Property(p_o, typeof(global::TestNs.Order).GetProperty("Product")); // o.Product
